definition:
1. altogether, absolutely , generally with Art., τὸ π. (Herdotus Historicus), etc.:—;with a negative, τὸ π. οὐδέν not at all , (Herdotus Historicus); οὔκ εἰμι τὸ π. ἄθεος (Plato Philosophus) 
2. in reckoning, ἐπὶ διηκόσια τὸ παράπαν up to two hundred altogether , (Herdotus Historicus) (ML)
